b_code:
function status(order: Order): 'pending' | 'refunded' | 'settled' {
  const unpaid = !order.paid
  if (unpaid) return 'pending'
  const refunded = order.refunded
  if (refunded) return 'refunded'
  return 'settled'
}

a_code:
type Loader<TInput, TIntermediate, TOutput> = (input: TInput) => Promise<TOutput>
export const makeLoader = <TInput, TIntermediate, TOutput>(step: (input: TInput) => Promise<TIntermediate>, finish: (value: TIntermediate) => TOutput): Loader<TInput, TIntermediate, TOutput> => async (input) => finish(await step(input))
